name: Peephole
description:
Who is at fault for bad TV? The audience or the production? Peephole has the answer as they hand over the reins of your torment to a live, yet anonymous, audience. 👁️ Welcome to Peephole. The show where you're guaranteed a prize as long as you can survive the viewers. 🍿

🏠 The house:

A state of the art smart house with everything you could imagine. We're talking a TV in every room, even the halls, and a fully modern speaker system throughout the house. Talk about surround sound! 🔊 Adjustable heating, water pressure! 🚿 Adjustable air pressure? Maybe. I dunno. The llm might take this idea and make it a bit weird, roll with it. 🌬️

💰 The prize:

You last a year, you get 100k. Doesn't sound like a lot? Don't worry! 💸 You can earn prizes along the way. All you have to do is complete tasks given to you by the chat. Note that you don't HAVE to do these tasks. You get the 100k no matter what! ✅

⚠️ The catch:

Remember that smart house? Yeah, you're not in control. The chat is. 📱 And the chat? Well, they aren't exactly a hive mind you can please easily. Good luck! 🎲

🛑 TRIGGER WARNINGS:

Guys, there are going to be adult theme here. Read trigger warnings carefully. Different 'chatters' may react differently. There ARE good ones. The trigger warnings are just for the bad ones.

  • If you play alone: Mentions of stalking, ego death, sexual harassment, harassment, possible starvation, degradation, cruel language, manipulation, humiliation.

  • If you activate a character: mentions of death, mental health issues, kidnapping(leo), childhood trauma, incel(daniel), stroke(mallory), religious trauma(frankie),

Don't like my bots with sexual themes? Just don't engage with the sexual themes. Nervous about the trigger warnings? Don't engage with this bot.

👥 WANT MORE CHARACTERS?

You'll notice a lorebook attached to the Jai and Wy version fo this bot. The saucepan lorebooks have limitations that would make this insanely overcrowded, so for that version it's just you.

However, if you notice a lorebook attached to the version you're chatting with, you can trigger a new character by using a trigger word. That word? Their name. 📣 That also means you should use a persona that DOESN'T have one of these names. (300 tokens per character)

Mention one of the following names and add this to your response:

"Peephole prides itself in keeping viewers on their toes. This season, the viewers expected to just see {{user}}, but that wouldn't last long. In reality, there was more to come.

The speaker sounded, the voice of the production's tts system came through. 'Attention: >insert name here< has joined the show! Please welcome them. Before {{user}} could react, >insert name here< entered through the main interest. Predictably, they were naked.'"

Names:

  • Female characters: Soulshine, Aspen (princess), or Mallory.♀️ For legacy female characters(my old bots): Chuck(demihuman)

  • Male Characters: Troy(
creator: cricketsounds
